name: screw
description: Provider-neutral secure code review commands, agents, skills, and MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: screw-agents packages curated vulnerability-specific review knowledge, portable assistant commands, and MCP tools for provider-neutral secure code review. Use it to run SQL injection, command injection, SSTI, and XSS scans; review false-positive learning; clean adaptive analysis artifacts; and exercise Phase 5 provider-primary, challenger, and parallel scan modes.
